sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n71192" key="nukti/gamos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">νυκτῐ´-γᾰμος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n71192.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">wedding by night, secretly,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0576.tlg001:7" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Musae.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">7</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
